PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Deb Kinney for Bonnie Burroughs, Proposed Executor (via Zoom).
Marilyn Shoemake, heir of law (via Zoom).

Ms. Shoemake raised concerns about conflicting documents received by herself and other heirs, leading to confusion regarding their status as beneficiaries. Ms. Kinney clarified that Ms. Shoemake was notified as an heir of law but may not be a beneficiary based on current documents. The court suggested that Ms. Shoemake contact Ms. Kinney directly to address questions about the documents.

The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 10, 2019 is admitted to probate. Bonnie M. Burroughs is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for January 27, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee.

The court discussed the potential need for a petition to determine entitlement if disputes regarding beneficiaries arise. A status hearing for this issue was scheduled for March 19, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and counsel was informed that if the petition is filed prior to that date, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
